description: A solid color used as a view (SwiftUI's Color is itself a View): a greedy block that fills the proposed space - a colored divider or tinted block. Give it a 'frame' to size it.

color.description: Color string: a named color ("red", "primary"/"secondary"), a hex string ("#RRGGBB" / "#RRGGBBAA"), or "<color>.opacity(<fraction>)"
